overview: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela), formerly known as Regional Engineering College Rourkela, is a premier autonomous public technical university established in 1961. Located in Odisha, India, it has been recognized as an Institute of National Importance under the Ministry of Education, Government of India. The institute offers a comprehensive range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across engineering, science, architecture, and management streams.
accreditation: An Institution of National Importance approved by the AICTE and Ministry of Education, Government of India.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: General/OBC (Family Income > ₹5 Lakhs): ₹62,500 per semester (Total tuition fee around ₹5.00 Lakhs for 4 years). Tuition fees are completely exempted for SC/ST/PH students and those with an annual family income under ₹1 Lakh.
General/OBC (Family Income > ₹5 Lakhs): ₹62,500 per semester (Total tuition fee around ₹6.25 Lakhs for 5 years). Centralized fee remission benefits apply based on category and family income matrices.
Approximately ₹35,000 to ₹40,000 base tuition fee per semester. Total semester institutional fees vary based on allocation criteria.
Approximately ₹7,500 tuition fee per semester (Total base institutional fees exclude food and variable mess advance components).

placements.avgSalary: ₹13.29 LPA (Overall Average Package), ₹14.10 LPA (B.Tech Average Package)
placements.totalOffers: 1,274 recruitment offers generated for graduating students
placements.companiesVisited: 373 companies participated in the formal placement drive
placements.internationalOffers: Limited / Kept under institutional non-disclosure guidelines

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech and B.Arch admissions are strictly managed via JoSAA/CSAB counseling schedules using JEE Main/NATA scores. M.Tech allocations depend on valid GATE parameters handled through CCMT. M.Sc courses utilize IIT JAM scores via CCMN channels.
admissions.importantDates: Strictly aligned with the centralized public notices from the National Testing Agency (NTA), JoSAA/CSAB, and CCMT platforms.

campus.area: Sprawling 1,200-acre modern residential green campus located in Rourkela, Odisha
facilities: Centre for Technology Innovation and Industry Relations
Foundation for Technology and Business Incubation
campus.specialNote: Hostel seat rent is ₹5,000 per semester, with Hall Establishment fees at ₹5,000 per semester. The approximate variable Mess Advance is around ₹30,000 per semester. A one-time refundable institutional Caution Money deposit of ₹10,000 is collected at enrollment.

scholarshipsAndAid.details: General/OBC candidates with a certified family income under ₹1 Lakh per year qualify for a 100% tuition waiver. Students whose family income ranges between ₹1 Lakh and ₹5 Lakhs per annum secure a 2/3rd tuition fee remission.

rankings.nirf: Ranked #13 under the Engineering Category and #7 under the Architecture Category in India by NIRF 2025
rankings.naac: Not applicable (An autonomous Institute of National Importance governed by the centralized NIT Council Act)

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Rourkela, Sector 1, Rourkela, Odisha, India 769008
